title: View recent tasks list and summary cards on Tarefas page
description: Verifies the Tarefas page renders the recent tasks list and the summary cards are visible.
category: Task list, filters, and report summary

steps.description: Verify element "Recent tasks list" is visible
Verify text "Tarefas no periodo" is visible

title: Filter tasks by valid date range and clear filters
description: Verifies that applying a valid De/Ate range updates the list and summary cards, and clearing filters resets them.
category: Task list, filters, and report summary

steps.description: Type "2026-02-01" into the "De" date filter field
Type "2026-02-21" into the "Ate" date filter field
Verify element "Recent tasks list" is visible

title: Filter tasks by project = Todos
description: Verifies selecting the project filter "Todos" keeps the list available and summary cards visible.
category: Task list, filters, and report summary

steps.description: Select "Todos" from the project filter dropdown
Verify element "Recent tasks list" is visible
Verify text "Tarefas no periodo" is visible

title: Filter tasks by project = Sem projeto
description: Verifies selecting the project filter "Sem projeto" updates the view without breaking list rendering and keeps summary cards visible.
category: Task list, filters, and report summary

steps.description: Select "Sem projeto" from the project filter dropdown
Verify element "Recent tasks list" is visible
Verify text "Tarefas no periodo" is visible

title: Filter tasks by a specific project (when available)
description: Verifies selecting a specific project filter option (if present) updates the list and keeps summary cards visible.
category: Task list, filters, and report summary

steps.description: Select the first specific project option that is not "Todos" and not "Sem projeto"
Verify element "Recent tasks list" is visible
Verify text "Tarefas no periodo" is visible

title: Combine date range and project filter together
description: Verifies using both date filters and a project filter together still renders results and summary cards without errors.
category: Task list, filters, and report summary

steps.description: Type "2026-02-01" into the "De" date filter field
Type "2026-02-21" into the "Ate" date filter field
Select "Todos" from the project filter dropdown
Verify element "Recent tasks list" is visible
Verify text "Tarefas no periodo" is visible

title: Delete a task via Excluir and confirm deletion updates summary cards
description: Verifies deleting a task through the confirmation modal removes it from the list and updates the summary cards.
category: Task list, filters, and report summary

steps.description: Verify element "Recent tasks list" is visible
Click "Excluir" on the first task row in the list
Verify element "Delete confirmation modal" is visible
Verify text "Tarefas no periodo" is visible

title: Cancel task deletion from confirmation modal
description: Verifies canceling the deletion keeps the task list visible and no destructive action is completed.
category: Task list, filters, and report summary

steps.description: Verify element "Recent tasks list" is visible
Click "Excluir" on the first task row in the list
Verify element "Delete confirmation modal" is visible
Verify element "Recent tasks list" is visible

title: Invalid date range shows user-facing validation and does not apply filters
description: Verifies setting De after Ate triggers a visible validation message and prevents applying the invalid filter range.
category: Task list, filters, and report summary

steps.description: Type "2026-02-21" into the "De" date filter field
Type "2026-02-01" into the "Ate" date filter field
Verify text "intervalo de datas inválido" is visible
Verify element "Recent tasks list" is visible

title: Create a completed manual task with project and verify list + totals update
description: Verifies a user can create a finished task using manual duration with an optional project and that the task list and total hours update.
category: Create manual task

steps.description: Type "Correção de bug" into "Nome da tarefa"
Select "Cliente A" from the project dropdown
Verify element "Nova tarefa" modal is not visible
Verify text "Correção de bug" is visible

title: Create a completed manual task without selecting a project (Sem projeto)
description: Verifies a user can create a finished manual task while keeping the project unset.
category: Create manual task

steps.description: Type "Tarefa sem projeto" into "Nome da tarefa"
Verify element "Nova tarefa" modal is not visible
Verify text "Tarefa sem projeto" is visible

title: Validation: cannot save manual task when name is empty
description: Verifies the form blocks saving and shows a required-name validation message when the task name is missing.
category: Create manual task

title: Validation: cannot save manual task when duration is 0 hours and 0 minutes
description: Verifies the form blocks saving and shows a validation message when manual duration is zero.
category: Create manual task

steps.description: Verify text "maior que zero" is visible

title: Manual task with minutes only (no hours) saves and formats duration correctly
description: Verifies that entering only minutes creates a finished task and displays duration in HH:MM format.
category: Create manual task

title: Manual task with hours only (no minutes) saves and formats duration correctly
description: Verifies that entering only hours creates a finished task and displays duration in HH:MM format.
category: Create manual task

title: Cancel/close modal does not create a task
description: Verifies that closing the new-task modal without saving does not add a task to the list.
category: Create manual task

steps.description: Type "Não deve salvar" into "Nome da tarefa"
Verify element "Nova tarefa" modal is not visible
Verify text "Não deve salvar" is not visible

title: Finalize immediately after start still results in a persisted task
description: Verifies a timer task can be started and immediately finalized, and it still appears in the list as finalized.
category: Create timer task (start, pause, resume, finalize)

steps.description: Type "Timer rápido" into "Nome da tarefa" field

title: Validation: cannot start timer without task name
description: Verifies that leaving the task name empty blocks starting a timer and shows a visible validation message.
category: Create timer task (start, pause, resume, finalize)

steps.description: Verify text "Nome da tarefa" is visible

title: Cancel/close new task modal does not create a task
description: Verifies closing the "Nova tarefa" modal without starting does not add a new task to the list.
category: Create timer task (start, pause, resume, finalize)

steps.description: Type "Não deve salvar" into "Nome da tarefa" field
Verify text "Nova tarefa" is not visible
Verify text "Não deve salvar" is not visible

title: Create a new project and verify it is selectable in 'Nova tarefa'
description: Creates a project from the Projetos view and confirms it appears in the task project selection.
category: Project management (create, rename, remove)

steps.description: Type "Cliente A" into the project name field
Verify text "Cliente A" is visible in the projects list
Verify text "Cliente A" is visible in the project selection options

title: Prevent creating a duplicate project name (case-insensitive)
description: Attempts to create a project with an existing name using different casing and verifies duplicate validation blocks creation.
category: Project management (create, rename, remove)

steps.description: Type "Cliente A" into the project name field
Type "cliente a" into the project name field
Verify text "já existe" (or equivalent duplicate-name validation message) is visible

title: Prevent creating a duplicate project name when extra spaces are used (trim validation)
description: Attempts to create a project with leading/trailing spaces and verifies it is treated as duplicate and not created.
category: Project management (create, rename, remove)

steps.description: Type "Cliente A" into the project name field
Type "  Cliente A  " into the project name field
Verify text "já existe" (or equivalent duplicate-name validation message) is visible

title: Require project name when creating a new project
description: Attempts to create a project with an empty name and verifies required-field validation blocks creation.
category: Project management (create, rename, remove)

steps.description: Verify text "obrigatório" (or equivalent required-name validation message) is visible
Verify text "Projeto adicionado" (or equivalent success message) is not visible
